page_content:
Scheme Name: UP Student Scholarship Scheme
Ministry/Department: Department of Social Welfare
State: Uttar Pradesh
Eligibility Criteria: Applicant must be a student resident of Uttar Pradesh. Annual family income should be below Rs. 200000. Category SC/ST/OBC. Age 18 to 25 years.
Benefit Amount: Rs. 12000 annually
Benefits: Financial assistance of Rs. 12000 annually.
Application Process: Apply online with caste, income, and education documents.
Application URL: https://scholarship.up.gov.in
Source PDF: https://example.gov.in/up-student-scholarship.pdf
